name: German Lentil Soup with Frankfurters
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, carrots, and celery. Sauté for about 5 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in water, lentils, bay leaf, salt, and pepper.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for approximately 30 minutes or until lentils are tender.
5. Add the sliced Frankfurters and cook an additional 10 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat and stir in cider vinegar before serving. Discard the bay leaf.
7. Serve hot; this recipe serves 8 people.
